text: I feel a curious tension standing at the boundary of this glass-walled room, as though I'm about to cross into another world—one committed to research, development, and the interplay of structured knowledge and human presence. There is an air of purposeful arrangement, yet I sense a distance between myself and the artifacts within—the order of the space contrasts with my inward uncertainty. This place urges me to contemplate not only technology and innovation, but also my own place within the ever-evolving logic of modern environments.
